description_long: This is a weathered stone obelisk, partially broken and leaning, set on a patch of earth covered with dry grass and scattered green vines. The obelisk consists of several stone segments, with one main upright shaft and additional fractured pieces lying at its base. The surface is rough and aged, with visible engravings and inscriptions on the front face, some of which are partially obscured by moss and plant growth. The tip of the obelisk is sharply angled, but the structure is damaged, with a large section missing or displaced. The base is irregular, blending into the surrounding ground, and the entire monument is surrounded by natural vegetation, giving it an abandoned, historical appearance.
description: A broken, weathered stone obelisk with visible inscriptions, surrounded by dry grass and green vines. The monument is partially collapsed and covered in natural vegetation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main upright shaft, broken segments at the base, and dense vegetation covering parts of the obelisk.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sharp angle of the broken shaft and the extent of the collapse, with vines trailing up the stone.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back of the obelisk and the irregular, earthy base.
description_view_3: Front-right view revealing the main inscription panel, broken stone pieces, and a clear view of the overgrown base.
attribute_inscription: Visible inscriptions are present on the front face of the main shaft, featuring engraved text in a serif style, possibly in Cyrillic script. The text is partially legible but obscured by weathering and plant growth.
attribute_ornamentation: A small circular portrait or medallion is present above the main inscription, but no other decorative motifs or patterns are visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is irregular and blends into the surrounding earth, with no distinct platform or steps. It is partially covered by dry grass and vines, and consists of broken stone segments.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is sharply angled but incomplete, with a fractured, jagged finish due to breakage. No decorative elements are present at the tip.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by dry grass, soil, and green vines that climb over the base and lower shaft. No artificial features or structures are present.
